actions.message: The north gate is locked — find the key (garage, east).
No power — throw the switch in the FAR EAST room (down the east hall).

stages.message: MORE OF THEM — FORCE YOUR WAY IN!
FASTER ONES — THEY’RE NOT ALL SHAMBLING!

keyLocks.speaker: Aspen
keyLocks.armText: This door is locked — you'll need the key. It's at the end of the garage, east.
keyLocks.unlockText: That's the one. The gate's open — go.
